snippet.title: Shrek 5 | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
It’s happening... it’s really happening!  Experience Shrek 5 only in theaters summer 2027.
______
 
Next summer, DreamWorks Animation invites audiences on a thrilling, magical new comedy adventure from one of the most beloved global animated franchises of all time: Shrek 5.
 
Comedy legends Mike Myers, Oscar® nominee Eddie Murphy and Cameron Diaz return to their signature roles as Shrek, Donkey and Fiona. Emmy winning superstar Zendaya (The Odyssey, Dune franchise) joins the cast as Shrek and Fiona’s daughter Felicia, along with Marcello Hernandez (Saturday Night Live, Happy Gilmore 2) and Skyler Gisondo (Superman, Booksmart) as Felicia’s brothers, Fergus and Farkle.  
 
Shrek 5 is directed by acclaimed filmmakers and Shrek franchise veterans Conrad Vernon and Walt Dohrn. Vernon was a member of the directing team on the Academy Award® nominated Shrek 2 as well as on DreamWorks Animation’s Madagascar 3: Europe’s Most Wanted and Monsters vs. Aliens. Vernon has also provided the voice of Shrek fan-favorite Gingerbread Man, aka “Gingy,” across all titles in the Shrek Universe. Dohrn worked on the second and third Shrek films as a writer and artist and as Head of Story on the fourth film. Dohrn also voiced the character of Rumpelstiltskin in Shrek Forever After. Dohrn served as co-director on the first Trolls film and directed Trolls World Tour and Trolls Band Together. 

The film is produced by returning producer Gina Shay (Trolls franchise), who produced Shrek Forever After and by Illumination CEO and Academy Award® nominee Chris Meledandri (the Super Mario, Despicable Me and Minions franchises). The film is co-directed by Brad Ableson (Minions: The Rise of Gru, The Simpsons).

snippet.title: Hexed | Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Welcome to Hexe, the world of witches. Disney’s #Hexed is only in theaters November 25

The first trailer and poster for Disney’s “Hexed,” an all-new magical coming-of-age saga releasing in theaters November 25, are now available. The original animated film is Walt Disney Animation Studios’ 65th animated feature.
 
Joining previously announced voice cast members Hailee Steinfeld and Rashida Jones are seven-time Emmy Award® winner Tracey Ullman (“The Tracey Ullman Show,” “Tracey Takes On…,” “Bullets Over Broadway,” “Robin Hood: Men in Tights”), who voices the enchanted feather quill pen Ms. Quill, and Stephen Fry (“Gosford Park,” “Wilde,” “Jeeves and Wooster,” “V for Vendetta,” “The Hobbit” trilogy) as the magical journal Elias Quire.
 
The new trailer introduces the impulsive and unconventional teenage girl Billie (voiced by Hailee Steinfeld) and her cautious mother, Alice (voiced by Rashida Jones). When Billie accidentally unleashes secret magical abilities, she’s hurtled out of suburbia and into a magical realm called Hexe, where she’s greeted by Ms. Quill (voiced by Tracey Ullman) and Elias Quire (voiced by Stephen Fry). As Billie’s spectacle-filled journey unfolds, she uncovers family mysteries that could change the magical world of witches forever.
 
Director Fawn Veerasunthorn said, “A wonderfully strange phenomenon is happening all around Billie, something she can’t explain. She's someone who has felt miscast in her own life, and it takes leaving her normal world behind and entering a hidden world of wild, unhinged magic to begin to understand herself.”
 
"Hexe is a place where Billie begins to feel seen for the first time in her life,” director Jason Hand said. “She embarks on a journey of self-discovery that reveals a powerful connection to magic, and in the process uncovers long-held secrets about her family.”
 
Disney’s “Hexed” is directed by Fawn Veerasunthorn and Jason Hand, co-directed by Josie Trinidad, and produced by Roy Conli and Yvett Merino. The film opens exclusively in theaters November 25, 2026.
 
ABOUT WALT DISNEY ANIMATION STUDIOS
Combining masterful artistry and storytelling with groundbreaking technology, Walt Disney Animation Studios is a filmmaker-driven animation studio responsible for creating some of the most beloved films ever made. Disney Animation continues to build on its rich legacy of innovation and creativity, from the first fully-animated feature film, 1937's “Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs,” to the studios’ #1 feature of all time, 2025’s “Zootopia 2.” Among the studio's timeless creations are “Pinocchio,” “Sleeping Beauty,” “The Jungle Book,” “The Little Mermaid,” “The Lion King,” “Frozen,” “Moana,” and “Encanto.”

snippet.title: Heartstopper Forever | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Heartstopper Forever comes to Netflix on July 17. In this final film Nick and Charlie are inseparable, but with Nick preparing to leave for university and Charlie finding new independence at school, the reality of a long-distance relationship begins to weigh on them. Doubts take hold, and their relationship faces its biggest challenge yet. Meanwhile, their friends are also navigating the ups and downs of love and friendship, confronting the bittersweet challenges of growing up and moving on. Can first loves really last forever?

Featuring 'Stupid Song', from Olivia Rodrigo's new album 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love'

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82040750

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

Heartstopper Forever | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

We will update you if the plan changes.

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

I thought I'd seen it all in Elden Ring.

After thousands of hours, nightmare randomizers, unfair mods, and enough self-inflicted suffering to concern a medical professional, I figured nothing in this game could still surprise me. Then one of you recommended a mod called After the Shattering.

I expected a tough challenge.

What I got instead was a fever dream forged by Lucifer himself.

This mod takes everything you know about Elden Ring and asks a simple question: "What if we made it worse?" Bosses hit harder, enemies have new tricks, entire areas are reworked, and the game constantly finds new ways to make you regret every decision you've ever made. snippet.title: Star Wars: The Old Republic - Official Legacy Reborn Launch Trailer
snippet.description:
The finale to Legacy of the Sith is here. Watch the Star Wars: The Old Republic 'Legacy Reborn' launch trailer for this Game Update 7.9 for the MMORPG. Darth Jadus has stolen the key to Darth Nul’s masterworks, and the race to the forgotten fortress of Naga Sadow on Khar Shian has begun. In the Legacy Reborn update, the battle transcends your own perspective. For the first time, take control of your allies in unique gameplay to reach the final showdown. With Malgus, Shae Vizla, and the Hidden Chain converging on the Sith moon, the outcome will determine the fate of the galaxy!

Game Update 7.9 'Legacy Reborn' is available now in Star Wars: The Old Republic.

snippet.title: Raúl Beltrán - Batallando De Este Lado (Letra Oficial)
snippet.description:
Letra oficial de "Batallando de Este Lado", grabada en vivo en Pisteando en el Rancho, de Raúl Beltrán.

🔥 Más de Raúl Beltrán:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQStUn3Fpb-BebdtoZwnPwO8yG1mqPlIN

Suscríbete para nuevos lanzamientos, videos y novedades:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCXPMAShgFsBws1OJax0wcTA/?sub_confirmation=1


Letra:

Acá andamos batallando de este lado
Cumplí el sueño americano y no crean que está tan pelado
Como me la habían contado
Voy de la casa al trabajo
Y muy pocas veces salgo
La verdad estoy enfadado.

El desierto dejó marcas en mi cuerpo
Y aunque le eché muchas ganas, ya casito y no la cuento
El tiempo pasaba lento
Yo con frío y bien hambriento
Anhelaba que me agarrara el Gobierno
Y me aventara pa'l pueblo.

Le agradezco a Dios que se logró y nunca me soltó la mano
Sé que detrás de lo que ha pasado ha estado mi madre rezando
Si me ven acá ha sido por ello'
Y aunque anhelo regresar al pueblo
Quiero regresar alivianado, o si no mejor no vuelvo.

Y regreso alivianado, si no mejor no vuelvo, viejones
Su compa Raúl Beltrán
Y échenle cabeza

Pensativo de cómo está mi familia
A la que yo tanto extraño, pienso y pienso día con día
Un abrazo de mi madre
Los consejos de mi padre
Mis viejitos que siempre me han apoyado
Para salir adelante
Sí es bonito estar acá, no hay que negar
Pero nunca se compara la comida a la de allá
Lo único que aquí hay dinero
Pocos amigos sinceros
Otros fueron muy culeros, lo recuerdo
Tuve que echarle más huevos.

Le agradezco a Dios que se logró y nunca me soltó la mano
Sé que detrás de lo que ha pasado ha estado mi madre rezando
Si me ven acá ha sido por ellos
Y aunque quiero regresar al pueblo
Quiero regresar alivianado, o si no mejor no vuelvo
Así dice el corrido y así habló su compa Raúl Beltrán.
¡Ánimo!

Originario de El Dorado, Culiacán, Sinaloa, Raúl Beltrán descubrió su pasión por la música desde temprana edad. Compositor desde los 14 años, construyó una identidad propia dentro de la música latina y la música regional mexicana, destacándose por letras profundas y mensajes de vida. Tras retomar su nombre artístico en honor a su padre, alcanzó reconocimiento con “Un Gran Papá” y consolidó su carrera independiente a partir de 2022. Proyectos como *Me Subestimaron*, *Corridos de Encargo Vol. 2*, *De la Pluma en Sierreño* y *Corridos Metafísicos* reflejan una trayectoria constante. Canciones como “Me Gustó Vivir La Vida”, “Mi Propio Jefe” y “Batallando De Este Lado” representan su enfoque en la autenticidad, el trabajo duro y la conexión real con su audiencia.

#RaulBeltran
#BatallandoDeEsteLado
#MusicaLatina

snippet.title: Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den Official Trailer | Overwatch
snippet.description:
Are you ready to step Into the Tiger’s Den?

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of our newest Damage Hero, Shion. As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies.

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner. Tokyo also comes to life in our new Anima Strike Meta Event where you earn new rewards based on which path you choose to go down.

That’s not all though! Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, new Ultra Skins with added VFX, new skins as part of our upcoming YOASOBI collaboration, and much more.

Experience all that Season 3: Into the Tiger’s Den has to offer when it arrives in-game TOMORROW.

Overwatch is free to play on PC and console, including Nintendo Switch™ 2
_

snippet.title: Dinosaurs of the Wild West | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
From the creative team behind the 2025 cult-dinosaur feature PRIMITIVE WAR comes a glimpse into an ambitious new world currently in development.

Inspired by the artwork of creator Shaun Keenan and expanded into an original cinematic universe by filmmaker Luke Sparke, this project blends western frontier mythology with a world where dinosaurs and humans have existed side by side for generations.

This is only the beginning.

The full trailer reveal, exclusive rewards and more will be unveiled when the official Kickstarter campaign goes live in 20 days.

🔥 Bienvenidos a Nación Mexa 🔥
El espacio donde el regional mexicano se vive con pasión: corridos, sierreño, norteño, banda, tumbados y más 🎺🎸

Si disfrutas nuestra música, suscríbete y activa la campanita 🔔 para unirte a la familia Nación Mexa 💚🤍❤️

🎵 Aquí encontrarás:
Kane Rodriguez - SE VOLVIERON LOCOS (Letra / Lyrics)
Kane Rodriguez - SE VOLVIERON LOCOS (Con Letra / Lyrics)
Kane Rodriguez - SE VOLVIERON LOCOS (Subtitulada / Lyrics)
Kane Rodriguez - SE VOLVIERON LOCOS (Lyrics)

🌎 Síguenos en redes sociales:

🌑 Facebook: Nación Mexa

🪐 Instagram: @nacionmexa

✨ TikTok: @nacionmexa

🎧 Playlist en Spotify:

📩 Promos/Business:

Para cualquier colaboración, promoción o cotización mándanos correo o mensaje directo en redes sociales.

Gracias por ser parte de Nación Mexa, la casa del regional mexicano 

¡Thanks for supporting Nación Mexa! 

Letra:
Se volvieron locos cuando vieron que a este loco le fue bien
Igual de sencillo, solamente más colmillo y mucha fe
Y van llegando los dolaritos
Y va creciendo mi negocito
Fama agarré también
Por las calles de L.A.
Pues pa las fiestas traigo un polvito
Y para un tiro, en caliente brinco
Barrio tiré también
Marcada está en mi piel
Y en una SRT
Quemando me han de ver
La llantita y un gallito
De copiloto, un culito
Aunque ahora nos va muy bien
Soy el mismo que era ayer
Sigue humilde el chamaquito
Nomás hoy con dinerito
¡Yah-yay!
Y se volvieron locos, viejo
Su compita Kane Rodriguez, ánimo
¿Cómo le hicimos?, es la pregunta
Que se preguntan los envidiosos
Que porque ven puros carros del año
Que por Qatar me vieron turisteando
Si hay negocios, me echan el grito
Y si hay morritas, les caigo en cinco
Pero primero, claro, lo que deja
Ya después vemos cómo está la vuelta
Y en una SRT
Quemando me van a ver
La llantita y un gallito
De copiloto, un culito
Y aunque ahora nos va muy bien
Soy el mismo que era ayer
Sigue humilde el chamaquito
Nomás hoy con dinerito

[Tags]
#kanerodriguez #sevolvieronlocos #nacionmexa
